scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@velocity-gp/api-contract && npm run build --workspace=@velocity-gp/api-client && npm run build --workspace=@velocity-gp/ui && npm run build --workspace=@velocity-gp/api && npm run build --workspace=@velocity-gp/web
scripts.build:api: npm run build --workspace=@velocity-gp/api-contract && npm run build --workspace=@velocity-gp/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace=@velocity-gp/api-contract && npm run build --workspace=@velocity-gp/api-client && npm run build --workspace=@velocity-gp/ui && npm run build --workspace=@velocity-gp/web
scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=@velocity-gp/api-contract && npm run build --workspace=@velocity-gp/api-client && npm run build --workspace=@velocity-gp/ui && concurrently -k -n contract,client,ui,web,api -c magenta,cyan,yellow,green,blue "npm run dev --workspace=@velocity-gp/api-contract" "npm run dev --workspace=@velocity-gp/api-client" "npm run dev --workspace=@velocity-gp/ui" "npm run dev --workspace=@velocity-gp/web" "npm run dev --workspace=@velocity-gp/api"
scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace=@velocity-gp/api-contract && npm run build --workspace=@velocity-gp/api-client && npm run build --workspace=@velocity-gp/ui && concurrently -k -n contract,client,ui,web -c magenta,cyan,yellow,green "npm run dev --workspace=@velocity-gp/api-contract" "npm run dev --workspace=@velocity-gp/api-client" "npm run dev --workspace=@velocity-gp/ui" "npm run dev --workspace=@velocity-gp/web"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace=@velocity-gp/api-contract && concurrently -k -n contract,api -c magenta,blue "npm run dev --workspace=@velocity-gp/api-contract" "npm run dev --workspace=@velocity-gp/api"
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace=@velocity-gp/api-contract && npm run build --workspace=@velocity-gp/api-client && npm run build --workspace=@velocity-gp/ui && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
